---
title: var-declaration
description: "Simplify zero-value declarations."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Simplify zero-value declarations. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
count := 0
```

## Good

```go
var count int
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only var-declaration`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
